system.description:
What it does (SRD): Superior camouflage or coloration makes the creature harder to spot—here modeled as a +4 racial bonus on Hide checks (in addition to size, Dexterity, ranks, and other modifiers).

ThirdEra: On this item’s Details tab, the +4 is entered in Mechanical effects (labeled Camouflage). It stacks with Dexterity, skill ranks, and other Hide bonuses.
